daily_summary.headline: Routine Day in Space: Starlink Launches and Aurora Calm

top_events.title: Starlink Group 17-24 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will deploy a batch of 25 Starlink satellites into low Earth orbit.

top_events.title: Starlink Group 10-46 Launch
top_events.description: Another Falcon 9 Block 5 mission for SpaceX's Starlink constellation, deploying 29 satellites.

top_events.title: Electron 'Eight Days A Week' Launch
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's Electron rocket will launch a synthetic aperture radar satellite for Synspective.
